allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('mode:', d['mode'], '| results:', len\(d['results']\), '| first:', d['results'][0]['canonical_name']\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/dev/stdin'\); process.stdin.resume\(\); let s=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>s+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const d=JSON.parse\(s\);console.log\('mode:',d.mode,'results:',d.results.length,'first:',d.results[0].canonical_name\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "let s=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>s+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const d=JSON.parse\(s\); console.log\('mode:', d.mode\); console.log\('results:', d.results.length\); console.log\('first:', d.results[0].canonical_name\); console.log\('score:', d.results[0].score+'/'+d.results[0].score_max\);}\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3802/api/ai-search -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"environmental circular funding bad actors"}')

Bash(node -e "let s=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>s+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const d=JSON.parse\(s\); console.log\('mode:', d.mode\); console.log\('results:', d.results.length\); console.log\('first:', d.results[0].canonical_name, '| score:', d.results[0].score\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "let s=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>s+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const d=JSON.parse\(s\); console.log\('news count:', d.news_mentions.length\); console.log\('flags:', d.red_flags_found.length\); console.log\('first headline:', d.news_mentions[0].headline\);}\)")
